professional_summary.title: Diego Sánchez
professional_summary.subtitle: Software Engineer & Full Stack Developer
professional_summary.summary_1: Final-year Software Engineering student with a Full Stack profile. I combine a strong technical foundation with experience in the design and architecture of modern software solutions.
professional_summary.summary_2: At Génexys, I contribute to technical decision-making and the development of microservices-based architectures using Python and AWS.
professional_summary.summary_3: My technical approach builds on my previous experience at Telefónica, where I worked within professional development workflows, collaborating on the development of scalable projects and the optimization of web performance. I currently apply these same engineering principles in my Final Degree Project (TripFlow), where I design a microservices-based PWA using Spring Boot with generative AI integration. Tech Stack: React • Next.js • TypeScript • Java (Spring Boot) • Python • Node.js • Docker • SQL • Git

work_experience.description: Full stack development in a professional environment, contributing to technical decisions and working with FastAPI and AWS.
achievements: Delivered end-to-end features and improvements in a microservice-oriented architecture.
Worked with FastAPI and Amazon Web Services (AWS) to build scalable solutions.
Collaborated with the team on technical decision-making and engineering best practices.

work_experience.description: Contributed to web application development with Next.js, working under the Mística Design System and implementing improvements in SEO and accessibility within an agile environment.
achievements: Implemented SEO and accessibility (a11y) improvements within a professional development workflow.
Designed and built a full-stack tool (React, Express, MongoDB) to automate technical audits and generate PDF performance reports.
Performed technical audits and web performance optimization (WPO), improving product quality, performance, and usability.

education_details.description: Last-year student, with honoring grades in web development, operative systems, and data structures.
